site.title: Equip Blog
site.tagline: Source-grounded publishing for medical equipment knowledge.
site.footer: Public scaffold ready for locale-aware expansion.

admin.title: Equip Blog Admin
admin.footer: Admin scaffold ready for authenticated workflows.

activationGuide: Add a new locale message file under src/messages.
Add the locale code to SUPPORTED_LOCALES when it is ready to go live.
Reuse the existing localization save flow to edit and persist the new locale.
localizationManagement.description: Edit the active English translation today while keeping future locales configuration-driven and schema-stable.
localizationManagement.editorDescription: Markdown, HTML, FAQ JSON, and structured content all persist per post and locale through the same storage layer.
localizationManagement.emptyPosts: No posts are available yet. Generated drafts and published posts will appear here as soon as content exists.
localizationManagement.inactiveLocaleHint: Register the locale in configuration and add it to SUPPORTED_LOCALES before editing.
localizationManagement.noStoredTranslation: No translation is stored yet for this locale.
localizationManagement.seededFromDefaultLocale: Seeded from the current English content so future locales can reuse the same persistence flow.
localizationManagement.title: Localization management

manufacturerManagement.creatingLabel: Creating a new canonical manufacturer record.
manufacturerManagement.description: Review canonical manufacturer records, collapse aliases, and keep source-backed metadata ready for research payload generation.
manufacturerManagement.editorDescription: Canonical name, domain, alias list, and verified branch-country coverage all flow into deterministic manufacturer normalization.
manufacturerManagement.emptyManufacturers: No manufacturers are stored yet. Create the first canonical record to start collapsing aliases.
manufacturerManagement.emptyModels: No models are linked to this manufacturer yet.
manufacturerManagement.emptySources: No source references are linked to this manufacturer yet.
manufacturerManagement.fieldAliasesHint: Enter one alias per line. Duplicate aliases are removed automatically.
manufacturerManagement.fieldBranchCountriesHint: Enter one country per line when branch presence is verified.
manufacturerManagement.listDescription: Select a manufacturer to review aliases, linked models, and stored sources.
manufacturerManagement.manufacturerSummary: Canonical manufacturer records ready for ranking and alias collapse.
manufacturerManagement.modelSummary: Stored models currently linked to canonical manufacturers.
manufacturerManagement.title: Manufacturers management

promptConfiguration.activeSummary: Prompt templates currently active for generation.
promptConfiguration.description: Manage the layered prompt templates that shape structured article generation, formatting, and safety boundaries.
promptConfiguration.editorDescription: Each active template is loaded by purpose during generation. Edit carefully so the composition pipeline keeps disclaimer, references, and section order intact.
promptConfiguration.purposeSummary: Required prompt purposes currently represented in the database.
promptConfiguration.statusReady: Prompt templates are ready for review.
promptConfiguration.templateSummary: Stored prompt template versions available to the generator.
promptConfiguration.title: Prompt configuration

sourceConfiguration.allowedDomainsHint: Enter one domain or wildcard domain per line. Leave blank to allow the tier to evaluate any domain.
sourceConfiguration.configurationsDescription: Priority is fixed by policy. This screen controls which source tiers are enabled and which domains are allowed for each tier.
sourceConfiguration.description: Manage approved research source tiers, allowed domains, and the exact order used by the research collector.
sourceConfiguration.enabledSummary: Source tiers currently enabled for research ingestion.
sourceConfiguration.notesHint: Describe why this tier is allowed, restricted, or temporarily disabled.
sourceConfiguration.restrictedSummary: Enabled tiers with explicit domain restrictions.
sourceConfiguration.title: Source configuration
sourceConfiguration.totalSummary: Defined source tiers in the Release 1 policy order.

generatePost.coverageDescription: These toggles mirror the validated request contract and keep the generated article aligned with the requested scope.
generatePost.description: Generate, review, and route English-first drafts from one admin surface while keeping duplicate handling, warnings, and schedule confirmation visible.
generatePost.duplicateDescription: Generation stops when a non-archived post already exists for the same canonical equipment and locale. Review the match, then replace it explicitly or keep the current post.
generatePost.fieldErrorPrefix: Fix the highlighted fields before continuing.
generatePost.formDescription: Defaults come from the shared request schema so the admin page and API stay aligned.
generatePost.localeHint: Release 1 keeps generation fixed to English while still using the shared locale field.
generatePost.noProviders: No enabled provider configs are available for generation.
generatePost.previewDescription: Review the saved draft, adjust key editorial fields, and hand off to the next action without leaving this page.
generatePost.previewEmpty: Generate a draft to load the preview, warnings, and follow-up actions.
generatePost.publishScaffolded: Publish and schedule endpoints are still scaffolded in this step, but the generate page is already wired to those final actions.
generatePost.publishUnavailable: Your current role cannot publish immediately in Release 1.
generatePost.replaceHint: Replacement preserves the existing post record and canonical slug unless an editor changes it later.
generatePost.replaceSuccess: Existing post replaced and preview refreshed.
generatePost.scheduleConfirmationDescription: Schedule intent is captured here, but final confirmation stays separate so the generated draft can be reviewed first.
generatePost.scheduleUnavailable: Your current role cannot confirm scheduling right now.
generatePost.scheduleHint: Choosing a time here captures schedule intent in the request. Final scheduling still requires explicit confirmation after draft review.
generatePost.stageActiveHint: The backend moves through these stages in order while the current request is running.
generatePost.stageSuccessHint: The last run completed and the saved draft preview is ready for review.
generatePost.summaryDescription: This sidebar mirrors the selected request, provider, and schedule intent so the generation path stays visible while you work.
generatePost.targetAudienceCardHint: Audience selections shape the tone and emphasis of the generated draft.
generatePost.targetAudienceHint: Choose one or more audience groups. The schema requires at least one selection.
generatePost.title: Generate post drafts

draftsList.archivedCountLabel: Archived posts retained outside the active draft queue.
draftsList.description: Review draft and scheduled posts, keep lifecycle state visible, and jump directly into editorial review.
draftsList.draftCountLabel: Current draft posts waiting for review or scheduling.
draftsList.emptyState: No draft or scheduled posts match the current filter.
draftsList.publishedCountLabel: Published posts already visible on public routes.
draftsList.scheduledCountLabel: Scheduled posts waiting for the publish worker.
draftsList.searchPlaceholder: Search drafts by title, slug, equipment, or category
draftsList.title: Draft posts

publishedList.archivedCountLabel: Archived posts retained for audit and future reference.
publishedList.description: Track the currently live content set, review the last published timestamps, and move into the editor when updates are needed.
publishedList.draftCountLabel: Draft posts still moving through review.
publishedList.emptyState: No published posts match the current filter.
publishedList.publishedCountLabel: Published posts currently visible on public routes.
publishedList.scheduledCountLabel: Scheduled posts prepared for later publication.
publishedList.searchPlaceholder: Search published posts by title, slug, equipment, or category
publishedList.title: Published posts

postEditor.archivePermissionHint: Your current role cannot archive posts.
postEditor.categoriesHint: Assign one or more categories so the post is ready for category landing pages and related-content grouping.
postEditor.contentDescription: Markdown, HTML, structured JSON, and FAQ JSON stay editable here while the default locale continues to use the shared draft persistence layer.
postEditor.contentStatus: Content changes stay in the current editorial stage until you move the workflow forward.
postEditor.description: Review the saved draft, move it through editorial checkpoints, and control schedule, publish, or archive actions from the same screen.
postEditor.noCategories: No categories exist yet. Create categories first to start assigning taxonomy.
postEditor.noNextEditorialStage: This post has already reached the final editorial checkpoint.
postEditor.publishPermissionHint: Your current role cannot publish posts immediately.
postEditor.returnToDraftErrorPrefix: Unable to move post back to draft
postEditor.scheduleHint: Scheduling requires a future publish time and remains separate from editorial checkpoints.
postEditor.schedulePermissionHint: Your current role cannot confirm scheduling.
postEditor.settingsDescription: Save slug and category assignments without changing the draft content fields.
postEditor.settingsStatus: Slug and taxonomy stay separate from publication state.
postEditor.slugHint: Slug updates are normalized and kept unique automatically.
postEditor.summaryDescription: This summary keeps the public path, lifecycle state, and post-level metadata visible while you edit.
postEditor.title: Editorial post workspace
postEditor.workflowDescription: Editorial checkpoints move one step at a time, while publish, schedule, and archive actions remain separate persisted status changes.

categoryManagement.categoryCountLabel: Canonical categories available for editorial assignment.
categoryManagement.deleteConfirmation: Delete this category? Existing post links will be removed.
categoryManagement.description: Manage the lightweight taxonomy used by editorial posts so category landing pages and post assignment stay consistent.
categoryManagement.editorDescription: Category names stay human-readable while slugs are normalized automatically for public routing.
categoryManagement.emptyState: No categories are stored yet. Create the first category to start assigning posts.
categoryManagement.listDescription: Select a category to review its current slug and post assignment count.
categoryManagement.slugHint: The slug preview updates after save so uniqueness and normalization stay consistent.
categoryManagement.slugPreviewPlaceholder: Slug will be generated on save
categoryManagement.title: Categories management

post.defaultDisclaimer: While care has been taken to ensure accuracy of the content in this post, this content is provided for educational and informational purposes only. It does not replace the manufacturer's official instructions, operator manual, service manual, safety procedures, or institutional biomedical engineering protocols. Always follow the official manufacturer guidelines and applicable clinical regulations.
